Education & Learning

Courses & Structured Learning

From high school classrooms to corporate boardrooms — our tiered course framework transforms African entrepreneurial knowledge into structured, scalable capability.

01

Youth Entrepreneurship Foundations

Building entrepreneurial mindsets from the ground up — designed for high school learners ready to move from intention to action.

High School Entrepreneurship Mindset Programme

A structured programme that cultivates entrepreneurial thinking, resilience, and opportunity recognition among high school learners.

Intention-to-Action Lab

A facilitated workshop bridging the gap between entrepreneurial intention and tangible first steps.

Mini Enterprise Lab

Hands-on enterprise simulation where learners build, test, and iterate real micro-ventures.

02

University-Level Entrepreneurship Modules

Rigorous, case-based modules grounded in African entrepreneurial realities — built for tertiary institutions seeking relevance and depth.

African Case-Based Entrepreneurship

Teaching entrepreneurship through real African case studies published via Ivey, Emerald, and Harvard platforms.

Effectuation in African Markets

Applying effectuation theory to the unique constraints and opportunities of African township and emerging markets.

Township Enterprise Systems

Understanding the systemic dynamics of township-based enterprises and their pathways to scale.

03

Corporate Masterclasses

Strategic sessions for executives, E&SD teams, and corporate leaders seeking to engage meaningfully with township economies and youth enterprise.

Shared Value & Township Markets

How corporates can create shared value by strategically engaging township markets as economic ecosystems.

Entrepreneurship as Ecosystem Strategy

Positioning entrepreneurship development as a core business strategy, not just a CSI line item.

Youth Enterprise Development Strategy

Designing effective youth enterprise programmes that move beyond motivation to measurable outcomes.

04

Educator Development

Equipping educators with the tools, methods, and confidence to teach African entrepreneurship with rigour and relevance.

Teaching African Entrepreneurship Effectively

Frameworks and facilitation techniques for delivering entrepreneurship content rooted in African contexts.

Case Method Training

Training educators in the case method of instruction using published African entrepreneurship case studies.

Intention-to-Action Facilitation

Developing facilitation skills to guide learners from entrepreneurial intention through to structured action.

Need a Tailored Programme?

Every institution, corporate, and community has unique needs. Contact us to discuss how we can design a programme that fits your context, audience, and objectives.

Join our community and receive stories
that inspire purpose and progress.

Celebrating determination, resilience, and success. Building stronger communities through inspiration and opportunity.
